employment_history___employer_1.address: 7420 Westhaven Industrial Park, Suite 300, Kansas City, MO 64147
employment_history___employer_1.reason_for_leaving:
After a little over three years with Northbridge Logistics Solutions Ltd, I decided to leave in order to relocate closer to my family and to pursue a role with broader responsibility in health and safety management rather than remaining in a primarily coordinator-level position. 

During my time there, I had progressed from focusing mainly on routine compliance checks and incident reporting to taking on more project-based work, such as helping to roll out a new near-miss reporting system across three warehouse sites and assisting with updating the company’s risk assessments following the introduction of new automated picking equipment. I found that I really enjoyed the more strategic side of health and safety, including training, culture-building, and working with department heads to design practical controls that fit with day-to-day operations. 

While Northbridge was supportive, the structure of the organization meant that there was a fairly flat hierarchy in the safety team, and there was no realistic opportunity to move into a more senior advisor or manager role in the short to medium term without someone else leaving. I had an open and positive conversation with my line manager, Daniel Hart, about my longer-term goals, and he agreed that given my interest in taking on more responsibility across multiple sites and functions, it made sense to look for a position where I could grow further. 

Additionally, my partner was offered a position in another state, and we made the decision together to relocate. This meant that even if a suitable internal opportunity had come up at Northbridge, I would not have been able to commit to staying in Kansas City long-term. I left on good terms, provided over six weeks’ notice, completed a thorough handover document for my replacement, and remained available by email for questions for several weeks after my last day to ensure continuity for the team.
